type.desc: The type of poll: SingleChoice, MultipleChoice, SingleChoiceImpact or MultipleChoiceImpact

gateID.desc: the gate id to be used for filtering who can interact with this poll

endTime.desc: the time the poll ends as a unix timestamp

optionCount.desc: the number of options in the poll

maxSelected.desc: the maximum number of selections in a multiple choice poll

boxCount.desc: the number of boxes created during the poll

funder.desc: the creator-side MBR funder to refund after the poll is deleted

optionOne.desc: the options and vote counts of the poll

votesOne.desc: the number of votes for each option

version.desc: the current version of the contract

akitaDAO.desc: the app ID of the Akita DAO

votes.desc: A map of addresses to empty bytes to track who has voted
